title: Building a Content Marketing Flywheel — Fares Ksebati, MySwimPro
description:
Our guest today is Fares Ksebati, Co-Founder and CEO of MySwimPro, the leading swim coaching app.

On the podcast talk with Fares about how to build a content marketing flywheel, the importance of content that’s inherently valuable, and why you shouldn’t give up on content marketing even if your early attempts only get a few views.
